name: Build all remaining pages
description: Build all remaining nofund dashboard pages and features: Auth (Login, Register, Forgot Password), Organization onboarding flow, Campaign Details page with Tabs (Overview, Donations, Donors, Settings), Create Campaign form with validation, Settings pages (Organization profile, payment, team), Payouts list + request payout, API Keys / Webhooks developer portal, and real-time Toast notifications. The project is a Laravel 11+ app with Livewire, Tailwind CSS v4, PostgreSQL, existing models/factories/seeders, and a full UI component system already built (AppShell, Sidebar, PageHeader, Card, StatCard, DataTable, Modal, Tabs, Badge, Buttons, Form components, etc.).
